findings.description: The footnote reference 'Levee Terms & Definitions (army.mil)' is a hyperlink in the PDF (underlined, colored text linking to army.mil) but is rendered as plain text in the HTML with no <a href> wrapping.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 4 footnote: '1 Levee Terms & Definitions (army.mil)' appears as a clickable hyperlink. HTML renders it as: '

1 Levee Terms & Definitions (army.mil)

' with no link.
